content: Prisma v6 vs Drizzle ORM for PostgreSQL+TypeScript: Prisma uses schema-first PSL with excellent migration tooling (prisma migrate dev), Prisma Studio for visual DB browsing, gentle learning curve (junior dev productive in 2 days). Drizzle is code-first with SQL-like control, smaller bundle (~7.4kb vs Prisma 7s 1.6MB), instant cold starts. For an academic project with a small team, Prisma wins on DX: schema file is self-documenting, Studio aids development, migrations are safeguarded. Drizzle preferred for edge/serverless production at scale.
